export.skill: id: replay_motion version: 1.0.0 description: | Replay a named NAO motion primitive or posture-compatible motion. This is the canonical local entry point for posture-style robot motion execution during the ROS4HRI refactor. interface: action default_interface_path: /skill/replay_motion datatype: nao_skills/action/ReplayMotion functional_domains: - motions parameters: in: - name: motion_name type: string required: true description: | Named motion primitive to replay (for example: stand, sit, kneel, crouch, standinit). - name: speed type: float default: 0.8 max: 1.0 description: Execution speed in [0.0, 1.0]. out: - name: success type: boolean description: True if the motion finished successfully. - name: message type: string description: Execution result message. - name: duration type: float description: Execution duration in seconds. feedback: - name: status type: string description: Execution phase (for example preparing/executing/completing). - name: progress type: float description: Progress value in [0.0, 1.0].

id: do_posture version: 1.0.0 description: | Execute NAO robot posture changes (Stand, Sit, Crouch, StandInit). interface: action default_interface_path: /skill/do_posture datatype: nao_skills/action/DoPosture functional_domains: - motions parameters: in: - name: posture_name type: string required: true description: | Target posture name accepted by the posture implementation (for example: Stand, Sit, Crouch, StandInit). - name: speed type: float default: 0.8 max: 1.0 description: Posture transition speed in [0.0, 1.0]. out: - name: success type: boolean description: True if posture request completed successfully. - name: message type: string description: Execution result message. - name: duration type: float description: Execution duration in seconds. feedback: - name: status type: string description: Execution phase (for example preparing/executing/completing). - name: progress type: float description: Progress value in [0.0, 1.0].

id: do_head_motion version: 1.0.0 description: | Execute NAO head motion by commanding HeadYaw and HeadPitch targets. The skill supports absolute targets and relative increments. interface: action default_interface_path: /skill/do_head_motion datatype: nao_skills/action/DoHeadMotion functional_domains: - motions parameters: in: - name: yaw type: float required: true description: HeadYaw angle in radians. - name: pitch type: float required: true description: HeadPitch angle in radians. - name: speed type: float default: 0.2 max: 1.0 description: Joint speed fraction in [0.0, 1.0]. - name: relative type: boolean default: false description: Whether yaw/pitch are interpreted as relative increments. out: - name: success type: boolean description: True if head motion request completed successfully. - name: message type: string description: Execution result message. - name: duration type: float description: Execution duration in seconds. feedback: - name: status type: string description: Execution phase (for example preparing/executing/completing). - name: progress type: float description: Progress value in [0.0, 1.0].
